_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of embedded analytics and augmented analytics concepts, including AI-assisted insight generation, natural language querying, automated anomaly detection, and their impact on self-service BI adoption.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-K-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-006 (DA, cosine: 0.330), OP-S-006 (OP, cosine: 0.330).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.1/10 (raw 0.213). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [ability, aggregation, configure, log] vs WIDAI-only terms [adoption, ai, analytics, anomaly, assisted, augmented] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.860 (P=0.880, R=0.842). P exceeds R by 0.039 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.5%). "Ability to configure log aggregation" and "Knowledge of embedded analytics and augmented analytics concepts, including AI-a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.350 > STS 0.213 (gap +0.137). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [ability, aggregation, configure, log]. WIDAI terms: [adoption, ai, analytics, anomaly, assisted, augmented].
